stepText: Charter a ship to Brimhaven (speak with Praistan Ebola at the spirit tree patch and Garth at the fruit tree patch), kill a monkey for a monkey paw and buy an inventory of food from Alfonse (only lobsters and better, hop as needed, leave 2 inv spaces). Take the rope swing to Moss Giant Island for the diary, run to the horseshoe mine, mine a gold ore for the diary and blow the whistle, continue Holy Grail (kill the Black Knight Titan, bring your rune shortsword and Excalibur. You can flinch with the rune shortsword for the full kill except the last hit).
itemsNeeded: 6293 gp, rune pickaxe, rune sword, Excalibur, trout/salmon, magic whistle, strike runes
